title: dalbergia foliosa
intro: Dalbergia foliosa, also known as the Philippine rosewood or Philippine mahogany, is a tropical tree species native to the Philippines. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Dalbergia foliosa include its potential to treat fever, pain, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues and wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant include extracts and infusions, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and topical applications for various health concerns.
